title: Grocery & CPG Product
description: Schema for grocery and consumer packaged goods (CPG) product listings.

product_name.description: Name of the grocery or CPG product. Commonly found in: product page h1, product card title, og:title meta tag.

brand.description: Brand name of the product. Commonly found in: brand field in product details, product byline, package brand label.

upc.description: Universal Product Code (UPC/EAN barcode). Commonly found in: product details table, product ID field, barcode data.

platform.description: E-commerce platform or grocery delivery app. Commonly found in: site domain, platform branding, app name.

store_name.description: Physical or online store name. Commonly found in: store name header, retailer branding, sold by field.

price.description: Current price of the product. Commonly found in: price display, product price span, JSON-LD price field.

unit_price.description: Price per unit of measure (e.g., per oz, per count). Commonly found in: unit price display, per oz price label, price per unit section.

unit_of_measure.description: Unit of measure for unit pricing (e.g., oz, lb, count). Commonly found in: unit price label, product weight field, package size indicator.

sale_price.description: Sale or discounted price. Commonly found in: sale price display, discount label, was/now price display.

availability.description: Current availability status. Commonly found in: availability badge, in stock indicator, add to cart button state.

category.description: Primary product category (e.g., Dairy, Snacks, Beverages). Commonly found in: breadcrumb navigation, category field, aisle label.

subcategory.description: Product subcategory. Commonly found in: breadcrumb navigation, subcategory field, aisle sub-label.

weight_oz.description: Product weight in ounces. Commonly found in: product size/weight field, package label, product details table.

calories.description: Calories per serving. Commonly found in: nutrition facts label, calories per serving display, nutritional info section.

ingredients.description: Ingredients list as a string. Commonly found in: ingredients section, product label ingredients, nutrition tab.

allergens.description: List of allergens present or may contain. Commonly found in: allergen section, contains/may contain labels, product warning section.

nutritional_info.description: Key nutritional values per serving. Commonly found in: nutrition facts panel, nutritional information section, nutrition tab.

certifications.description: Certifications or labels (e.g., Organic, Non-GMO, Gluten-Free). Commonly found in: certification badges, product label certifications, filter tags.

images.description: URLs of product images. Commonly found in: product image gallery, image carousel, og:image meta tag.

description.description: Product description text. Commonly found in: product description section, about this item, product overview.

page_title.description: Title of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.

favicon.description: Favicon URL of the source page. Tabstack auto-fills this from page metadata when left empty.
